# Nir Moran — AI-Native Builder

> Non-coder who builds real, deployed web applications using AI as his development team.
> Based in Sderot, Israel. Actively looking for employment.

## Who is Nir Moran?

Nir Moran is an AI-native builder from Sderot, Israel. He has zero traditional coding background and builds full-stack web applications entirely through AI collaboration — using Claude (Anthropic), Claude Code, and related tools. He is the architect; AI is his development team.

In 6 months he went from zero to 8 deployed projects. Two of those are used daily by real family members.

Contact: nirmoran1@gmail.com | 054-316-3837

## Projects Built

### ShamenzEat (shamenz-eat.vercel.app)
Hebrew family recipe app. Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Vercel. AI nutrition estimation in Hebrew, family sharing, iOS PWA. Used daily by family.

### Plugat Sheli (plugat-sheli.vercel.app)
IDF reserve unit management system. 13 modules: soldier tracking, equipment, training, scheduling, reporting.

### Split Ease
Smart expense splitter. Hebrew-first. Used daily by Nir's sisters.

### Medicine Tracker
Family health assistant for medications, dosages, schedules. Used daily by Nir's parents.

### Sol Israel, Receipt Scanner, Pudgy Pals, Bob AI Agent
Additional projects — see portfolio for details.

## Stack
Claude, Claude Code, Next.js, React, Tailwind, Supabase, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Vercel, GitHub Actions, Base44

## What Makes Nir Unique
- Non-coder who ships working full-stack apps — rare in 2026
- Builds for real users (family uses his apps daily)
- Deep hands-on Claude/Claude Code/MCP/Skills experience
- Hebrew-language AI applications

## Looking For
Employment (not consulting) in: AI Implementation, AI Operations, AI Product, Technical PM with AI focus
